title: M365 Standalone Graph Runtime Integration Pack

active_corrective_plan.reason: The 1.1.1 snapshot proved live delegated Graph access but failed formal installed-payload readiness with art=false and still needs dependency, real-socket acceptance, and provenance correction.

execution_plan_ref: Operations/EXECUTION_PLAN.md § Initiative: M365 Standalone Graph Runtime Integration Pack
objective: Build a real standalone Microsoft Graph auth/runtime integration pack that UCP can install, launch, configure, health-check, and invoke from the installed marketplace artifact.
current_truth: The current artifact is a UCP-facing client/contract pack.
The current artifact requires a configured M365 service URL for live work.
The current artifact does not contain the full Microsoft Graph runtime service.
A real integration pack must include the runtime service and fail closed until auth and Graph health pass.
The 1.1.1 snapshot is historical prerelease evidence, not a formal ready artifact.
The active corrective target is com.smarthaus.m365@0.1.2.

anti_alignment: Does not permit username/password auth storage.
Does not permit UCP-embedded Graph implementation.
Does not permit source-repo lookup from installed artifact.
Does not permit Ready=true before service, auth, token, Graph, and permission health pass.

in_scope: MA formalization for standalone pack readiness and action execution
Microsoft OAuth delegated auth and app-only auth setup contracts
local runtime service launched from installed artifact
out_of_scope: write actions before separate mutation-governance approval
public SaaS hosting or webhook receivers

readiness_formula: Ready(p,c,r,u,A,h)=ArtifactSelfContained(p,r) and RuntimeLaunchable(p,r) and AuthConfigured(c) and TokenStoreSafe(c,r) and GraphReachable(c,h) and PermissionsSufficient(A,c,h) and UcpContractsResolvable(p,u) and AuditComplete(A,h) and NoSourceRepoDependency(p,r)

requirements.description: Create the governed plan package and stop before implementation.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Plan triplet, prompt pair, execution plan, file index, and action log are synchronized.

requirements.description: Approve intent and current-state truth before math or code.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: CTO approves the real-integration intent and current artifact gap truth.
Readiness and execution predicates are documented with deterministic failure classes.
Lemma docs and invariant YAML bind artifact, auth, permission, readiness, audit, and packaging obligations.

requirements.description: Produce green notebooks and scorecard before extraction.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Notebook replay is green and scorecard certifies deterministic extraction readiness.

requirements.description: Build installed-artifact runtime service with real Microsoft auth.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Installed artifact launches runtime service and exposes real Microsoft auth setup/status/clear flows.

requirements.description: Build read-only Graph action runtime with permission matrix and audit.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Read-only Graph actions execute with permission matrix, retry bounds, normalized errors, and audit.

requirements.description: Build UCP contracts and local lifecycle launch/health behavior.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: UCP resolves setup, auth, health, readiness, action, and lifecycle contracts from installed artifact.
Final .ucp.tar.gz includes runtime service, checksums, signatures, provenance, and conformance evidence.

requirements.description: Complete UCP activation and read-only live acceptance.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Source-removal and live read-only UCP-to-Graph acceptance pass.

requirements.description: Publish operations, rollback, and release evidence.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Runbook, rollback, token recovery, version migration, and support evidence are complete.

parent_child_phases.title: Intent Definition And Baseline Lock
children: P0C M365 versus UCP boundary lock
parent_child_phases.gate: CTO approves intent explicitly; no implementation begins.

parent_child_phases.title: Governing Formula And Formal Calculus
parent_child_phases.gate: Formal calculus exists with deterministic result classes.

parent_child_phases.title: Lemmas And Machine Invariants
parent_child_phases.gate: Lemma docs and invariant YAML approved.

parent_child_phases.title: Runtime Service And Auth Foundation
parent_child_phases.gate: Runtime launches from installed-artifact layout and auth states are deterministic.

parent_child_phases.title: Microsoft Graph Action Runtime
parent_child_phases.gate: Read-only Graph acceptance works; write actions remain fenced.

parent_child_phases.title: UCP Pack Contract And Local Lifecycle
parent_child_phases.gate: UCP contracts resolve from installed artifact only.

parent_child_phases.title: Packaging And Distribution
parent_child_phases.gate: SHA256SUMS and conformance pass with runtime service present.

parent_child_phases.title: UCP Marketplace Activation Boundary
parent_child_phases.gate: Cross-repo work is separately governed and M365 does not mutate UCP without scope approval.

parent_child_phases.title: Acceptance Evidence And Release
parent_child_phases.gate: Ready=true is proven from installed artifact and live read-only Graph action succeeds through UCP.

parent_child_phases.title: Operations Rollback And Maintenance
parent_child_phases.gate: Runbook, rollback, and support evidence are complete.

stop_conditions: claiming the current client-only artifact is a complete integration
extracting runtime code before MA notebooks and scorecard are green
depending on the source repo from the installed artifact
returning Ready=true with unknown auth, token, Graph, or permission state
adding write actions without separate mutation-governance approval
